{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Imperial cloudship
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Imperial cloudship]] is a hundred paces long and forty wide with three levels.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Imperial cloudship]] features five scripted tubes on its back that function as propulsion.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
